chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-96 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 310/24 3.For orders on CMA 311/24 4.For hearing of main case 21-11-2025 Mr. Naheed Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. **** Counsel for the petitioner submits that this petition was filed against the interim order passed by learned Family Judge; however, final judgment and decree have been passed by the trial Court and same have been challenged. Therefore, under instructions, he does not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed along with listed application(s). JUDGE Ahmad
